Trading Requirements

S D STAR FX LTD offers arrays of account types to choose from. So that you do not have to look anywhere else but enhance your trading knowledge and skills.

STANDARD

  • Minimum Deposit: $25
  • Spread: 1.4
  • Commision: No
  • Leverage: 1:500
  • Trading Platform: MT 5

PRO

  • Minimum Deposit: $2500
  • Spread: 0.9
  • Commision: No
  • Leverage: 1:400
  • Trading Platform: MT 5

ECN
